confidence.note: This plan is based on partial data. Some areas may need verification before L2 implementation.

dependency_notes: **Regulatory Governance & Risk Management** must precede **Food Safety & Hygiene Compliance** — Regulatory governance underpins food safety compliance

tasks.title: Health & Safety Risk Assessment
tasks.description: Conduct an immediate regulatory compliance check. Is your health and safety risk assessment current? Are fire extinguishers inspected and fire exits clear? Do you have employers liability insurance displayed? Are your gas and electrical safety certificates current? Check your food business registration and any premises licence requirements. Fix any compliance gaps this week.

failure_modes.fm_title: Regulatory compliance and risk management failure
Health and safety risk assessment failure
Fire safety and emergency preparedness failure
Licensing and employment law compliance failure

sub_actions.text: Download or create a risk assessment template suitable for cafe environments
Conduct a full hazard identification walk-through of every area of the premises
Rate each identified hazard for likelihood and severity
Document control measures for every medium and high risk with assigned responsibility
Brief all staff on key risks and control measures in a team meeting
File the completed risk assessment and set an annual review date
Ensure the accident book (BI 510) is available and all staff know where it is

tasks.title: Fire Safety & Emergency Procedures
tasks.description: Conduct an immediate regulatory compliance check. Is your health and safety risk assessment current? Are fire extinguishers inspected and fire exits clear? Do you have employers liability insurance displayed? Are your gas and electrical safety certificates current? Check your food business registration and any premises licence requirements. Fix any compliance gaps this week.

failure_modes.fm_title: Regulatory compliance and risk management failure
Health and safety risk assessment failure
Fire safety and emergency preparedness failure
Licensing and employment law compliance failure

sub_actions.text: Obtain a fire risk assessment template and begin the premises walk-through
Verify all fire safety equipment is present, functional, and correctly positioned
Install any missing fire extinguishers, fire blankets, or emergency signage
Draft emergency evacuation procedures with roles and assembly point
Post evacuation procedure and floor plan in visible locations
Brief all staff on evacuation procedure and conduct an escape route walk-through
Ensure all escape routes are clear and unobstructed

deliverables.name: Emergency Evacuation Procedure and floor plan
Fire Drill Record and Debrief template

tasks.title: Licensing & Employment Law Audit
tasks.description: Conduct an immediate regulatory compliance check. Is your health and safety risk assessment current? Are fire extinguishers inspected and fire exits clear? Do you have employers liability insurance displayed? Are your gas and electrical safety certificates current? Check your food business registration and any premises licence requirements. Fix any compliance gaps this week.

failure_modes.fm_title: Regulatory compliance and risk management failure
Health and safety risk assessment failure
Fire safety and emergency preparedness failure
Licensing and employment law compliance failure

sub_actions.text: Complete a licensing audit checklist covering all required licences and registrations
Verify food business registration status with the local authority
Confirm PPL PRS music licence is in place if any music is played
Check that employer liability insurance is current and displayed
Review every employee file for written contract, right-to-work check, and pension enrolment
Verify NMW/NLW rates are correct for all staff
Flag and prioritise any compliance gaps for immediate resolution

deliverables.name: Compliance Calendar with renewal dates and deadlines

tasks.title: Health & Safety Risk Assessment
tasks.description: Build a regulatory compliance calendar covering all required inspections certifications and renewals. Create a risk register identifying operational health and safety and financial risks with mitigation plans. Implement an incident reporting system for accidents near-misses and safety concerns. Develop emergency procedures covering fire medical emergency equipment failure and supply disruption. Ensure employment law compliance including contracts right-to-work checks and pension auto-enrolment.

tasks.title: Internal Food Safety Self-Assessment
tasks.description: Create a food safety training matrix showing every team member's certification status expiry date and next renewal. Schedule refresher training before certificates expire. Develop an internal food safety induction that covers your specific procedures not just generic training. Conduct a mock EHO inspection quarterly using the official scoring criteria.

failure_modes.fm_title: Food safety training and certification failure
EHO readiness and audit compliance failure

tasks.title: EHO Inspection Readiness
tasks.description: Create a food safety training matrix showing every team member's certification status expiry date and next renewal. Schedule refresher training before certificates expire. Develop an internal food safety induction that covers your specific procedures not just generic training. Conduct a mock EHO inspection quarterly using the official scoring criteria.

failure_modes.fm_title: Food safety training and certification failure
EHO readiness and audit compliance failure

tasks.title: Health & Safety Risk Assessment
tasks.description: Regulatory compliance should be effortless because your systems make it automatic. Build a compliance culture where everyone understands the importance of safety and legal requirements. Review your risk register quarterly and update as your operation evolves. Your regulatory house should be in order at all times not just before inspections.

tasks.title: Internal Food Safety Self-Assessment
tasks.description: Embed food safety training into your cafe's identity. Every new starter should complete food safety induction before handling food. Build an internal food safety champion role with responsibility for standards compliance and continuous improvement. Your EHO readiness should be permanent not a last-minute preparation exercise.

failure_modes.fm_title: Food safety training and certification failure
EHO readiness and audit compliance failure
